name: Compliance concern
about: Report copyright, privacy, platform-policy, or credential-safety concerns
title: "[Compliance]: "
labels: compliance, security-review
assignees: ""
---

## Concern type

- [ ] copyright or licensing
- [ ] private or sensitive content
- [ ] credential exposure
- [ ] platform terms or access-control concern
- [ ] unsafe adapter behavior
- [ ] MCP/agent tool boundary concern
- [ ] other

## Where is the concern?

File, command, adapter, output, or documentation section:

## Description

Explain the issue without pasting secrets, cookies, tokens, API keys, private course content, or copyrighted full text.

## Suggested safer behavior

What should Source2Study block, redact, warn about, or document differently?

## Impact

Who could be affected?
